creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Thu Apr 24 16:44:39 2014
New Revision: 352018
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352018
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352018/

Log:
  - Update to version 0.6.0 [1]
  - Use options subs
  
  PR:		ports/187793 [1]
  Submitted by:	Zsolt Udvari <udvzsolt@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout

Modified:
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/Makefile
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/distinfo
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/pkg-plist

Modified: head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/Makefile	Thu Apr 24 16:42:32 2014	(r352017)
+++ head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/Makefile	Thu Apr 24 16:44:39 2014	(r352018)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	herbstluftwm
-PORTVERSION=	0.5.3
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.6.0
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://herbstluftwm.org/tarballs/
 
@@ -22,21 +21,10 @@ MAKE_ARGS=	PREFIX=${PREFIX} SYSCONFDIR=$
 		MANDIR=${PREFIX}/man
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	BASH ZSH DOCS EXAMPLES
+OPTIONS_SUB=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MBASH}
-PLIST_SUB+=	BASH=""
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	BASH="@comment "
-.endif
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MZSH}
-PLIST_SUB+=	ZSH=""
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	ZSH="@comment "
-.endif
-
 post-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/-[LI]\/usr/s,/usr,${LOCALBASE},' \
 		${WRKSRC}/config.mk

Modified: head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/distinfo	Thu Apr 24 16:42:32 2014	(r352017)
+++ head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/distinfo	Thu Apr 24 16:44:39 2014	(r352018)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (herbstluftwm-0.5.3.tar.gz) = 910cf98f57a439593a3114fd78bf36c107a2e033e75383f95d8e51128a04d0bf
-SIZE (herbstluftwm-0.5.3.tar.gz) = 205515
+SHA256 (herbstluftwm-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 148359784220f41b8c7c81bc64b1a1e5e10472f0e331fbea2ecb23cab741c6ef
+SIZE (herbstluftwm-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 229360

Modified: head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/pkg-plist	Thu Apr 24 16:42:32 2014	(r352017)
+++ head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/pkg-plist	Thu Apr 24 16:44:39 2014	(r352018)
@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@ man/man7/herbstluftwm-tutorial.7.gz
 %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/loadstate.sh
 %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/q3terminal.sh
 %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/savestate.sh
+%%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/scratchpad.sh
 %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/wselect.sh
 share/xsessions/herbstluftwm.desktop
 @dirrmtry share/xsessions
